name: 2Flow
description: Ireland's specialist eCommerce fulfilment partner. 2Flow provides pick and pack, kitting, subscription fulfilment, Amazon FBA prep, same-day Dublin delivery and full 3PL services for DTC and eCommerce brands shipping from Ireland.

skills.name: Fulfilment Service Information
skills.description: Provide detailed information about 2Flow's eCommerce fulfilment services: pick and pack, kitting and bundling, subscription fulfilment, Amazon FBA prep, returns, same-day Dublin delivery, live commerce, and retail distribution.

skills.name: Request a Fulfilment Quote
skills.description: Direct brands to 2Flow's quote request form to receive a tailored eCommerce fulfilment pricing proposal built from six components: inbound, storage, pick and pack, value-add services, shipping, and returns.
examples: I need a fulfilment quote for 2,000 orders per month

skills.name: Book a Discovery Call
skills.description: Schedule a call with the 2Flow team to discuss fulfilment requirements and onboarding.
examples: I want to speak to someone at 2Flow
How do I get started with 2Flow?
